title: Working with windows
drDigitalIntro:
Every app opens in a window — a rectangle you can move and resize.
• Move a window by dragging its title bar.
• Resize it by dragging the corner handle.
• Minimize hides it to the taskbar. Maximize fills the screen.
• Close removes the window entirely.

playgroundTask.goal: You moved, resized, minimized, maximized, and closed a window

steps.say: Drag the title bar (the yellow strip at the top of the window) to move the window.
Drag the striped corner handle at the bottom-right to resize the window.
Click the − button to minimize the window.
Click the 'Notes' button in the taskbar at the bottom to bring the window back.
Click the □ button to maximize the window so it fills the screen.
Click the □ button again to restore the window to its normal size.
Click the ✕ button to close the window.

drDigitalSuccess: You moved, resized, minimized, maximized, and closed a window — you're a window expert!
drDigitalHint: Look for the yellow highlight — it shows exactly what to click or drag next.
